name: accountsservice
title: accountsservice
summary: query and manipulate user account information
description:
query and manipulate user account information
The AccountService project provides a set of D-Bus
interfaces for querying and manipulating user account
information and an implementation of these interfaces,
based on the useradd, usermod and userdel commands.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use accountsservice because query and manipulate user account information.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use accountsservice as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair accountsservice with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `accountsservice --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
